title: Near Deadly Threat
description: Adds a few new mobs and biomes (VERY EARLY, BIOMES DON'T WORK YET), I'm not sure if the mobs in this mod spawn naturally, I haven't worked on this specific version in a while. Working on 0.3
body:
This mod will add a multitude of dangers, biomes, and (supposedly) abandoned structures. This mod aims to hopefully improve exploration and adventure aspects for beginning, middle, and end-game activities.
## CURRENT FEATURES
This mod currently adds:
- 3 new ores
- 2 new mobs
- 4 new biomes
- 2 new structures
- 2 new armor sets
- 1 new fuel source
- 1 new explosive
- 1 new dimension
(TO PLACE DIMENSION, BUILD 4x4 CHRODOMACH BLOCK SQUARE ON GROUND,
LIGHT WITH DOMINITE ISOTOPE)
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
FUTURE FEATURES
A currently unknown number of new ores and mobs,
Working biomes,
Bosses.
</details>

I have returned and will update soon

Fabric Only
Fabric API Required

Some support would be nice :)
